info.name: Eyewear System API
info.description: Backend-only API collection for Eyewear System UTH - EVELENS. Includes route coverage, role-based tokens, seeded credentials, dynamic variables, and basic response scripts.

exec: // Init negative test flag if not set
function upsertHeader(key, value) { if (value) pm.request.headers.upsert({ key, value }); }
if (tokenName) { const token = pm.collectionVariables.get(tokenName); if (token) upsertHeader('Authorization', 'Bearer ' + token); pm.request.headers.remove('X-Auth-Token-Var'); }
// Skip global status check if this is a negative test case
let json = null; try { json = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
if (json) pm.test('Response is valid JSON', function () { pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

function dig(obj, keys) { if (!obj || typeof obj !== 'object') return undefined; for (const key of keys) { if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, key)) return obj[key]; } if (obj.data && typeof obj.data === 'object') return dig(obj.data, keys); return undefined; }

function firstArray(obj) { if (Array.isArray(obj)) return obj; if (obj && Array.isArray(obj.data)) return obj.data; if (obj && obj.data && Array.isArray(obj.data.data)) return obj.data.data; if (obj && obj.data && Array.isArray(obj.data.items)) return obj.data.items; if (obj && Array.isArray(obj.items)) return obj.items; return []; }
function setIf(name, value) { if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') pm.collectionVariables.set(name, String(value)); }

if (json) { const data = json.data || json; setIf('productId', dig(data, ['product_id','id'])); setIf('variantId', dig(data, ['variant_id','first_variant_id'])); setIf('orderId', dig(data, ['order_id','id'])); setIf('paymentId', dig(data, ['payment_id','id'])); setIf('ticketId', dig(data, ['ticket_id','id'])); setIf('voucherId', dig(data, ['voucher_id','id'])); setIf('addressId', dig(data, ['address_id','id'])); setIf('shipmentId', dig(data, ['shipment_id','id'])); const arr = firstArray(json); if (arr.length && arr[0]) { setIf('productId', arr[0].product_id || arr[0].id); setIf('variantId', arr[0].variant_id || arr[0].productvariant_id || arr[0].first_variant_id); setIf('orderId', arr[0].order_id || arr[0].id); setIf('paymentId', arr[0].payment_id || arr[0].id); setIf('ticketId', arr[0].ticket_id || arr[0].id); setIf('voucherId', arr[0].voucher_id || arr[0].id); setIf('addressId', arr[0].address_id || arr[0].id); setIf('shipmentId', arr[0].shipment_id || arr[0].id); } }
pm.test('Data array should not contain null items', function() {
pm.test('[SKIP] Reset Password — requires real token/state, skipped in CI', function () {
pm.test('[SKIP] Verify Email — requires real token/state, skipped in CI', function () {
if (res.success && res.data && res.data.access_token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('managerToken', res.data.access_token); pm.collectionVariables.set('authToken', res.data.access_token); }
if (res.success && res.data && res.data.access_token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('salesToken', res.data.access_token); pm.collectionVariables.set('authToken', res.data.access_token); }
if (res.success && res.data && res.data.access_token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('operationsToken', res.data.access_token); pm.collectionVariables.set('authToken', res.data.access_token); }
pm.test('Status code is 401 Unauthorized', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(401); });
pm.test('Response has error message', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData).to.have.property('success', false); });
pm.test('Status code is 422 Unprocessable Entity', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(422); });
